error_signature: There was a problem loading the parameter options from server: '[object Object]'
title: Slack node channel list not loading
symptom: When trying to load the channel list in the Slack node, an error occurs stating there was a problem loading the parameter options from the server.
not_this_if: Slack node is functioning correctly with other parameters
root_cause: The error occurs because the Slack app lacks the necessary permissions to read the channel list. Without the correct scopes, the node cannot retrieve the required data from the Slack API.
fix_steps: Retry loading the channel list in the Slack node
agent_instruction: Add the 'metadata.message:read' permission scope to your Slack app and save the changes.
